name: ice
description:
降临新行星[阿德里],收集遗物获得全局增益,构建矩阵网络重构物流体系,在血肉与钢铁交织的异星上,体验截然不同的工厂与战斗———最后,选择你的道路

Land on the planet Ardery, collect Remains for global bonuses, build Matrix Networks to restructure your logistics, and experience a completely different kind of factory and combat on an alien world where flesh and steel intertwine———In the end, choose your path.
author: Alon
